bank_runs_what_content_1: Ukugijimela ebhange kwenzeka lapho abantu abaningi kakhulu bezama ukukhipha imali yabo ebhange ngesikhathi esifanayo.
bank_runs_what_content_2: Uma amabhange engenayo imali eyanele ukuhambelana nokukhishwa, angawa ngokuphelele lapho kugijinyelwa ebhange.
bank_runs_how_content_1: Isistimu yethu yamabhange ine-'fractional reserve' okusho ukuthi amabhange awagcini nje imali yakho ehholo ayelindele ukuba uyisebenzise noma uyikhiphe.
bank_runs_how_content_2: Kunalokho, ibhange lakho lithatha imali yakho liyikhokhise noma liyitshalomali. Lokhu kungavalela imali yakho isikhathi eside, nakuba ibhange likuthembisa amandla okukhipha imali yakho nganoma yisiphi isikhathi.
bank_runs_how_content_3: Ngakho kwenzekani uma uzama ukukhipha imali yakho ngemuva kokuthi ibhange seliyikhokhisile noma seliyitshalomali?
bank_runs_how_content_4: Akuyona inkinga uma uwedwa ozama ukukhipha. Ibhange lizothatha imali yomuntu omunye likunike yona. Kodwa kwenzekani lapho abantu abaningi kakhulu bezama ukukhipha ngesikhathi esifanayo?
bank_runs_how_content_5: Abantu abaningi e-USA bathola impendulo lapho kugijinyelwa i-Silicon Valley Bank ngoMashi ka-2023.
bank_runs_how_content_6: Ibhange lalitshalomali imali yamakhasimende alo emabondini kahulumeni ayevalekele iminyaka engafinyelela ku-30. Ngokulikhulu, inani lawo mabondi lase lehlile kakhulu kamuva, ngakho i-Silicon Valley Bank yayingeke ithengise amabondi ukuthola imali yabafaki bemali. Yayingenayo imali eyanele. Yayingenayo imali eyanele ukuhambelana nokukhishwa kwabafaki bemali.
bank_runs_how_content_7: Njengoba abantu abaningi bethola, inkinga yaba yimbi kakhulu. Izicelo zokukhipha ezengeziwe zafika, kodwa eziningi azizange zikhokhelwe. Izinkulungwane zamabhizinisi zabona ukuthi ngeke zikwazi ukukhokha izisebenzi zazo ngenxa yokuwa kwebhange.
bank_runs_how_content_8: I-FDIC yangenelela futhi yavuma ukukhokha abafaki bemali ngokuphelele. Inkinga ixazululiwe? Hhayi kangakho...
bank_runs_fdic_content_1: Umshwalense we-FDIC wenzelwe ukuvikela abafaki bemali bamabhange uma kwenzeka ibhange liwa. Imali egcinwe ivikelelwe kufinyelela ku-$250,000 ngomfaki wemali ngamunye. Kuzwakala kahle, angithi?
bank_runs_fdic_content_2: Hhayi kangakho. Uma ibhange liwa, i-FDIC iyithola kuphi imali? Inesikhwama somshwalense esinemali engu-$125 billion.
bank_runs_fdic_content_3: Lokho kuzwakala njengomali eningi kuze kuyiqhathanise nenani lemali egcinwe eyishwalensayo: cishe angu-$10 trillion noma angu-$10,000 billion.
bank_runs_fdic_content_4: I-FDIC ngisho ibonisa kuwebhusayithi yayo ukuthi inemali eyanele esikhwameni sayo somshwalense ukumboza nje ngaphezu kwe-1% yemali egcinwe.
bank_runs_fdic_content_5: Uma kwenzeka ibhange liwa ngaphezu kwesikhwama somshwalense se-FDIC, kungenzeka (kodwa akuqinisekisiwe) ukuthi uhulumeni wase-US uzophrinta imali ukuze abafaki bemali bathole imali yabo ngokuphelele.
bank_runs_fdic_content_6: Kodwa ukuphrinta imali kubangela infleshini, ngakho akuyona isixazululo esihle.
bank_runs_safe_content_1: Amanye amabhange azamile ukuba 'amabhange aphephile' angakhokhisi noma atshalomali imali yabafaki bemali.
bank_runs_safe_content_2: Nakuba la mabhange aphephile engaba ngaphandle kwengozi yokugijimela kwamabhange, izicelo zawo zenqatshwe yi-Federal Reserve. Lokhu kusho ukuthi awakwazi ukusebenza ngokomthetho njengamabhange.
bank_runs_safe_content_3: Ngoba avinjelwe ekusebenzeni, awekho amabhange namuhla angasebenzisi i-fractional reserve.
bank_runs_safe_content_4: Ngenhlanhla, kukhona indlela yokuphuma kule sistimu ye-fractional reserve ngokuba ibhange lakho. Cha, asikhuluml ngokufihla imali engokoqobo ngaphansi komqamelo.
bank_runs_safe_content_6: Sikhuluma nge-Bitcoin: isistimu entsha yezezimali ekuvumela ukuba ibhange lakho.
bank_runs_protect_content_1: Yebo, i-Bitcoin iyisistimu yezezimali ye-full reserve.
bank_runs_protect_content_2: Ukugijimela kwamabhange akwenzeki ku-Bitcoin uma nje ukhipha i-Bitcoin yakho uyise esikhwameni sakho. Ungashiyi i-bitcoin yakho ku-exchange noma kwi-wrapper efana ne-Bitcoin ETF.
bank_runs_protect_content_3: Bheka Umhlahlandlela Wethu Olula Wesikhwama se-Bitcoin ukuze ufunde ukuthi ungakhipha kanjani uyise esikhwameni sakho.
bank_runs_protect_content_4: Nge-Bitcoin, ekugcineni ungakwazi ukulawula imali yakho.
